metadata.dataset_name: Cortex Air Mode - Block C Airport Capability
metadata.purpose: Mock/reference airport capability matrix for Cortex air-mode R&D readiness checks.
metadata.legal_note: R&D/mock reference only. Values are first-pass capability flags from public web sources; replace/validate with paid APIs, airport/handler contracts, or live station data before production use.
recommended_next_research: TUN local/OACA/Tunisair Handling special-cargo capability documents
DXB dnata/Emirates SkyCargo special cargo pages
aircraft fit / ULD and door dimensions dataset

airport_capabilities.known_handlers: WFS; SAS Cargo station handling partners; Alyzia/ACH/BRINKS mentioned for some services
airport_capabilities.operating_hours_note: Some restrictions from station source: animal station closed 22:00-07:00; HUM embargo weekends; VAL export embargo / handled via BRINKS confirmation
airport_capabilities.source_notes: SAS Cargo CDG lists PIL, AVI, VAL, VUN, HUM, LHO, DG, HEA, PER, COL, FRO. WFS CDG page lists cold chain, animal station, pharma/perishable/security rates.

airport_capabilities.known_handlers: Frankfurt Cargohub; Perishable Center Frankfurt; multiple cargo handlers
airport_capabilities.operating_hours_note: Perishable Center Frankfurt described as 24/7/365. DG storage all classes except explosives for more than 24h.
airport_capabilities.source_notes: Frankfurt Cargohub states all classes of dangerous goods can be handled/stored for more than 24h except explosives; valuables storage; Perishable Center Frankfurt with 20 climate zones from -25°C to +25°C.

airport_capabilities.known_handlers: Schiphol cargo community; dnata Netherlands; special cargo facilities near Schiphol
airport_capabilities.operating_hours_note: Airport cargo page emphasizes temperature-controlled perishables, flowers, pharmaceuticals, animal compliance and dedicated transport facilities.
airport_capabilities.source_notes: Schiphol official cargo page covers pharma, perishables/flowers, and animals/inspection facilities. dnata Netherlands says teams handle perishables, dangerous goods, live animals and aircraft-related cargo. Specialist DG facility near Schiphol supports DG evidence.

airport_capabilities.known_handlers: dnata; Emirates SkyCargo; Dubai Customs; MOCCAE for plants/live animals; Ministry of Health for pharmaceuticals
airport_capabilities.operating_hours_note: Dubai Airports cargo page identifies the ecosystem for customs, live animals/plants, and pharmaceuticals.
airport_capabilities.source_notes: Dubai Airports cargo page names dnata, Emirates SkyCargo, Dubai Customs, MOCCAE and Ministry of Health involvement for cargo categories.

airport_capabilities.known_handlers: Qatar Airways Cargo; Hamad International Airport cargo terminal
airport_capabilities.operating_hours_note: Good airport/cargo terminal evidence, but detailed airport-level flags need direct station/handler data.
airport_capabilities.source_notes: HIA official cargo page supports cargo terminal presence. Qatar Airways Cargo public service articles support pharma/perishable service capability.

airport_capabilities.known_handlers: HACTL; AAT; other HKIA franchised cargo service providers
airport_capabilities.operating_hours_note: AAT lists special cargo facilities including COOLPORT, strong room, dangerous goods room, live animals storage, and radioactive room.
airport_capabilities.source_notes: HKIA official infrastructure page plus AAT special cargo facilities and HACTL IATA CargoLink listing support broad capabilities.

airport_capabilities.known_handlers: SATS; Lufthansa Cargo station
airport_capabilities.operating_hours_note: Lufthansa Cargo SIN station lists DG and live animals export/import/transit; live animal opening hours daily 00:01-23:59.
airport_capabilities.source_notes: SATS site states handling for DG, general cargo, perishables, pharma services, high-value goods and e-commerce. Lufthansa Cargo station supports DG and AVI evidence.

airport_capabilities.known_handlers: Needs targeted handler research: WFS JFK, dnata JFK, Swissport JFK, JFK cargo terminals
airport_capabilities.operating_hours_note: Not enough clean source evidence from first-pass search; keep low confidence.
airport_capabilities.source_notes: Placeholder R&D row. Requires another search before treating special cargo capability as known.

airport_capabilities.known_handlers: Tunisair Cargo; IAG Cargo/3S Cargo contact listed
airport_capabilities.operating_hours_note: IAG Cargo TUN page: Monday-Friday 09:00-16:00, no cargo at weekends, no VAL. Tunisair Cargo official page provides Tunisia cargo contacts.
airport_capabilities.source_notes: Tunisair Cargo confirms cargo operation/contact. IAG Cargo TUN gives operating hours and explicit 'No VAL'. Detailed special-cargo capability remains unknown.

airport_capabilities.known_handlers: International Cargo Centre Shenzhen (ICCS); Shenzhen Airport International Cargo Terminal; Shenzhen Airport Cargo
airport_capabilities.operating_hours_note: Shenchang International Cargo Terminal reported as 24/7 customs-clearance international cargo terminal; ICCS lists pharma business 00:00-24:00.
airport_capabilities.source_notes: Shenzhen Airport news confirms 24/7 international cargo terminal and customs clearance. Shenzhen Airport and ICCS pages confirm cold-chain facilities (-20C to 8C, -20C to 25C). EyeShenzhen report confirms CEIV Pharma and refrigerated pharmaceutical warehouse.

airport_capabilities.known_handlers: Shanghai Pudong International Airport Cargo Terminal Co., Ltd. (PACTL); PACTL West
airport_capabilities.source_notes: PACTL pages confirm PVG cargo terminals, customs support, Cool Center, temperature-controlled/freezer/refrigerator/ambient ranges, perishable, live-animal, valuable and oversized/heavy handling. IATA confirms PACTL CEIV Pharma, CEIV Fresh and CEIV Live Animals.

airport_capabilities.known_handlers: China Southern Air Logistics; Guangzhou Baiyun International Logistics Co., Ltd. (AIRLOG); ANA Cargo appointed warehouse
airport_capabilities.operating_hours_note: ANA Cargo CAN warehouse listed 09:00-17:00; other cargo-terminal hours not found.
airport_capabilities.source_notes: Guangzhou government page confirms China Southern Air Logistics international cargo terminal and Baiyun Airport Customs House. AIRLOG profile confirms cargo storage, customs declaration and bonded business. ANA Cargo confirms station warehouse and hours.

airport_capabilities.known_handlers: Air China Cargo; Beijing Aviation Ground Services (BGS)
airport_capabilities.operating_hours_note: JAL Cargo PEK station lists Air China Cargo warehouse office hours Mon-Sun 06:30-23:00.
airport_capabilities.source_notes: Air China Cargo Beijing station confirms special-cargo services including valuable, live-animal, cool-chain pharmacy and perishable cargo. JAL station page confirms PEK cooler/freezer/CRT, valuables, live animals, special storage and ULD cold storage. BGS confirms airport cargo/mail handling.

airport_capabilities.known_handlers: Korean Air Cargo; Asiana; AACT; DHL; FedEx; Swissport
airport_capabilities.operating_hours_note: ANA Cargo ICN warehouse listed 24 hours, 7 days; handler-specific restrictions may vary.
airport_capabilities.source_notes: Incheon official cargo-terminal page confirms multiple cargo terminals, warehouses, specialized processing and customs-bonded areas. Cool Cargo Center confirms temperature-sensitive cargo incl. pharma/perishables. Korean Air Cargo confirms cooler/freezer/valuables/live-animal/ULD. Swissport confirms temperature-controlled handling.

airport_capabilities.known_handlers: IACT; ANA Cargo; JAL Cargo; Nippon Cargo Airlines; Swiss WorldCargo appointed handler
airport_capabilities.operating_hours_note: Swiss WorldCargo Tokyo/Narita lists import 00:00-24:00 and export 06:00-22:00; handler-specific.
airport_capabilities.source_notes: Narita official document confirms Cargo Building No. 8 and expanded temperature-controlled facilities for pharma and fresh. IACT confirms import/export handling, AEO, Cargo Climate Control Terminal, CEIV Pharma, valuables and live-animal facilities. JAL confirms CEIV Pharma at Narita.

airport_capabilities.known_handlers: Taiwan Air Cargo Terminal Ltd. (TACT); Evergreen Air Cargo Services (EGAC); Farglory Free Trade Zone
airport_capabilities.operating_hours_note: JAL/EGAC station lists Mon-Sun 06:30-21:30; Farglory public office listed Mon-Fri 09:00-17:30.
airport_capabilities.source_notes: Taoyuan Airport confirms three operating cargo terminals and handler presence. TACT confirms special-goods storage for frozen/cooler/controllable temperature and valuables, plus ULD storage and CCTV. EGAC and Farglory confirm cargo-terminal presence. JAL confirms warehouse addresses and hours.

airport_capabilities.known_handlers: FedEx Express; Forward Air/United Cargo; Air General; Delta Cargo
airport_capabilities.operating_hours_note: Air General MEM pickup/drop-off listed Mon-Fri 05:00-22:00; FedEx and other operator hours handler-specific.
airport_capabilities.source_notes: Memphis Airport cargo page confirms major cargo-airport status and FedEx hub role. CBP fact sheet confirms customs. United Cargo confirms secured area, gated high-value cage and 24/7 security cameras. FedEx confirms air-freight center. Air General confirms cargo terminal and hours.

airport_capabilities.known_handlers: UPS Worldport; Air General
airport_capabilities.operating_hours_note: Air General SDF listed air hours Mon-Fri 05:00-20:00 and Sat-Sun 05:00-09:00.
airport_capabilities.source_notes: Louisville airport pages confirm SDF as a top global cargo airport (UPS Worldport), supporting cargo-terminal/freighter/ULD for a large dedicated hub. Air General confirms cargo-terminal presence and hours. Specialized cold-chain/secure-storage details not found in cited public sources.

airport_capabilities.known_handlers: Nippon Cargo Airlines; FedEx Express; UPS Airlines; Alaska Air Cargo; ANC Cargo and Cold Storage
airport_capabilities.source_notes: ANC official site confirms major cargo-airport role. FAA/Alaska project documents confirm large-scale air-cargo warehouse and climate-controlled infrastructure. NCA ANC facility page confirms warehouse, refrigerator, freezer, valuables lock room and heavy forklift capability.

airport_capabilities.known_handlers: United Cargo; Swissport; WFS; Air General; Nippon Cargo Airlines; ANA Cargo; IAG Cargo handlers
airport_capabilities.operating_hours_note: Air General/WFS ORD export 07:00-22:00 daily; IAG Cargo customs Mon-Sun 08:00-21:00; some ANA/NCA warehouse ops 24h.
airport_capabilities.source_notes: United Cargo and Swissport confirm O'Hare cargo warehouses. WFS confirms cool-chain via Etihad/WFS partnership. IAG confirms Constant Climate and customs hours. ANA Cargo confirms ORD warehouse and 2-8C cold storage.

airport_capabilities.known_handlers: United Cargo; WFS/Mercury Air Cargo; IAG Cargo; Swiss WorldCargo appointed handler; American Airlines Cargo
airport_capabilities.operating_hours_note: IAG Cargo LAX handling Mon-Sun 08:00-22:00; handler-specific hours vary.
airport_capabilities.source_notes: United Cargo confirms LAX coolers, ULD cold capacity, secured cage and ambient storage. IAG confirms LAX hours, Constant Climate and Live Animals. WFS confirms pharma/cold-chain/freighter-ramp. Swiss WorldCargo confirms GDP station, active-container, frozen/cool/CRT/ERT ranges.

airport_capabilities.known_handlers: WFS; Swissport; Amerijet; LATAM Cargo; American Airlines Cargo
airport_capabilities.source_notes: MIA official cargo pages confirm handler ecosystem, U.S. Customs proximity, and pharma/perishables/livestock product lines. MIA news confirms CEIV-certified pharma partners and future perishables facility. WFS confirms pharma/cold-chain/freighter. Amerijet confirms CEIV temperature-controlled with security monitoring.

airport_capabilities.known_handlers: WFS; Swissport; IAG Cargo/British Airways; Heathrow Animal Reception Centre (HARC)
airport_capabilities.operating_hours_note: Handler hours vary; live-animal forwarding via HARC.
airport_capabilities.source_notes: Heathrow cargo page confirms high-value, pharmaceutical storage, Border Control Posts for plants/food/live animals and government-agency presence. WFS confirms pharma/cold-chain. Swissport confirms new Heathrow temperature-controlled facility. IAG confirms Heathrow Constant Climate pharma center.

airport_capabilities.known_handlers: Luxcargo Handling; Cargolux; LuxairCargo
airport_capabilities.operating_hours_note: Luxembourg cargo presentation notes 24/7 services for live animals, meat and agricultural products; handler-specific conditions may vary.
airport_capabilities.source_notes: Luxembourg Airport cargo page confirms dedicated cargo airport, freighter ops, GDP-compliant pharma platform and Cargolux home-base. Luxcargo Handling confirms valuable/live-animal/perishable/outsize handling. Government logistics pages confirm freight center, free trade zone for valuables, perishables, live animals, medical devices and pharma.

airport_capabilities.known_handlers: WFS; Swissport; Liège Cargo Agency
airport_capabilities.source_notes: Liège Airport confirms specialization in perishables, pharma, live animals, express, medical and humanitarian cargo; live-animal page confirms on-site BCP/veterinary inspection. Swissport confirms IATA CEIV Pharma at LGG. WFS tariff confirms DG check, pharma/medical, live-animal and VAL/VUN categories.

airport_capabilities.known_handlers: WFS; dnata; Swissport; Aviapartner Cargo
airport_capabilities.operating_hours_note: BRUcargo zone reports 24-hour customs service; handler hours vary.
airport_capabilities.source_notes: Brussels Airport confirms BRUcargo community, animal care and pharma expertise, 24-hour customs, perishables, live animals and e-commerce. dnata Belgium confirms CEIV Pharma, Live Animals and Lithium Batteries plus GDP. WFS confirms dedicated pharma/perishables terminal and AVI/valuables handling.

airport_capabilities.known_handlers: Alha Group; WFS; Swissport; DHL Express; FedEx
airport_capabilities.operating_hours_note: Alha notes no night curfews at MXP; ANA Cargo warehouse 24/7.
airport_capabilities.source_notes: Malpensa Cargo City confirms 500,000 m2 cargo area, seven first-line warehouses, 4,000 m2 temperature-controlled for pharma/food/perishables, and customs agents. Alha confirms cargo terminal, no night curfews, regular full-freighter handling. WFS confirms cold-chain/pharma and customs-authorised receiver status. Lufthansa Cargo confirms live animals, valuables, DG and 24/7 export station.

airport_capabilities.known_handlers: IAG Cargo/Iberia Cargo; WFS
airport_capabilities.operating_hours_note: IAG Cargo MAD customer support Mon-Fri 08:00-00:00, Sat/holidays 10:00-18:00.
airport_capabilities.source_notes: AENA confirms authorised cargo customs and health-check facilities at Madrid-Barajas. IAG Cargo confirms MAD served by passenger aircraft, road and freighters, GDP-certified Constant Climate pharma centre (2-8C, 15-25C) and airside refrigerated trucks. WFS Spain tariff confirms cold cargo, live animals, special/vulnerable goods, DG and perishable import categories.

airport_capabilities.known_handlers: Turkish Cargo / SMARTIST
airport_capabilities.operating_hours_note: Turkish Cargo TK Pharma lists 24/7 customer care and 24/7 Pharma Control Tower.
airport_capabilities.source_notes: Turkish Cargo confirms SMARTIST at Istanbul Airport as strategic hub. TK Pharma confirms CEIV Pharma/GDP, dedicated temp-controlled storage (2-8C, 15-25C, -15/-20C), cool/thermal dollies and active ULD containers. Special-cargo pages confirm fresh/perishables, live animals, DG, valuables, vulnerable and aerospace cargo.

airport_capabilities.known_handlers: FIEGE Air Cargo Logistics; UPS; FedEx Express
airport_capabilities.source_notes: Cologne Bonn Cargo confirms capability for largest freighters, UPS European Air Hub, FedEx Express, separate cold storages for perishables/medical, valuable-goods area, six hazardous-goods cubicles and TAPA/ISO security-restricted warehouse; services page confirms live animals, temp-controlled, outsized, DGR and VAL. Lufthansa Cargo confirms DG, live animals, perishables, frozen/+2-8/+15-25 storage and valuables.

airport_capabilities.known_handlers: DHL; UPS; FedEx; Royal Mail
airport_capabilities.operating_hours_note: Major overnight express cargo hub; exact cargo-terminal acceptance hours not found in official public sources.
airport_capabilities.source_notes: MAG confirms EMA is the UK's busiest pure cargo airport (>394,000 tonnes/yr), a major hub for DHL/UPS/FedEx/Royal Mail, and accommodates the largest freight/passenger aircraft. DHL confirms Express cargo presence and customs expertise. Public sources did not clearly confirm airport-level pharma, freezer, DG, live-animal or secure VAL storage.

airport_capabilities.known_handlers: Etihad Airport Services Cargo; Etihad Cargo
airport_capabilities.source_notes: Abu Dhabi Airports confirms cargo facilities, equipment, customs and perishables/pharma cargo. Etihad Cargo confirms cargo-village pharma cool-chain expansion (-80C to 25C), CEIV Pharma and Fresh, 3,300 m2 pharma hub, 3,000 m2 perishables warehouse, plus live animals, DG, valuables and vulnerables. Abu Dhabi Media Office confirms customs operations at Zayed Cargo Village.

airport_capabilities.known_handlers: Mumbai Cargo Service Center; Adani Airports / CSMIA cargo; Air India Cargo
airport_capabilities.source_notes: CSMIA cargo page confirms cold storage, live animals, hazardous goods, valuable cargo and project cargo over 3 tonnes. Air India Cargo confirms GDP-certified BOM pharma station, active/passive pharma, cool dollies, -20C to +20C active range; products confirm Pharma, Fresh, DG, Live Animals and Valuables. AERA references Mumbai Cargo Service Center cold-chain facility.

airport_capabilities.known_handlers: Delhi Cargo Service Center; Celebi Delhi Cargo Terminal Management; Air India Cargo
airport_capabilities.source_notes: Delhi Airport cargo page confirms perishable, pharma, project and heavy cargo; sustainability report references live animals, DG, radioactive and gems/jewellery. Celebi Delhi confirms IATA CEIV Pharma for temperature-sensitive pharma. Air India Cargo confirms GDP-certified DEL pharma station and products for pharma, fresh, DG, live animals and valuables.

airport_capabilities.known_handlers: GRU Airport Cargo; LATAM Cargo; Swiss WorldCargo appointed station
airport_capabilities.operating_hours_note: GRU Cargo scheduled delivery operates daily 03:00-10:00 after customs clearance for eligible cargo.
airport_capabilities.source_notes: GRU Cargo confirms temperature-controlled chambers, live-animal facilities and special areas for valuable cargo, radioactive material and dangerous items; perishable retrieval after customs clearance; cold chambers for pharma, fruits, fish and fresh produce. Swiss WorldCargo confirms GRU station and pharma service. (city_country uses ASCII 'Sao Paulo' to aid lookup.)

airport_capabilities.known_handlers: Talma Mexico
airport_capabilities.source_notes: Talma Mexico confirms >11,000 m2 bonded warehouses at Airport Customs in Mexico City and Toluca, specialized storage for perishables, valuables, oversized, DG, pharma and live animals, refrigerated cargo, freezing chamber, ULD storage and cold-chain control. Refrigeration page confirms CEIV Pharma and EMA-certified refrigerated facilities. (single-handler source -> medium confidence.)

airport_capabilities.known_handlers: Swissport; Menzies Aviation; SAA Cargo
airport_capabilities.operating_hours_note: Lufthansa Cargo JNB station: general import/export mostly 08:00-17:00; VAL mostly 08:00-16:00.
airport_capabilities.source_notes: Swissport confirms five modern cargo warehouses at O. R. Tambo. Lufthansa Cargo JNB confirms Menzies/SAA terminal, DG, live animals, perishables, +15/+25 and +2/+8 storage, frozen import storage and valuables. SAA Cargo confirms high-value, live animals, perishables, DG and mail. IAG Constant Climate lists JNB as import-only pharma station -> pharma marked partial.

airport_capabilities.known_handlers: EgyptAir Cargo; CACC Cargolinx; IAG Cargo appointed office
airport_capabilities.operating_hours_note: IAG Cargo CAI office/reservations Sat-Thu 08:30-15:30, Fri closed.
airport_capabilities.source_notes: EgyptAir Cargo confirms cargo handling and product lines Pharma, Fresh, Live Animals, DG, Valuable and Auto/Charter. CACC Cargolinx confirms Cairo Cargo City import/export/express terminals, large direct-tarmac facility; pharma/time-temperature pages confirm CEIV Pharma-certified, thermally mapped terminals, +2/+8C, +15/+25C and 0/-18C freezer chambers and cool dollies. IAG Cargo confirms CAI office and hours.

airport_capabilities.known_handlers: Ethiopian Cargo & Logistics Services
airport_capabilities.source_notes: Ethiopian Cargo confirms Addis Ababa Bole hub for pharma/healthcare, live animals, perishables, DG, vulnerables, valuables, charter, trans-shipment and project logistics. Addis Hub page confirms 1,000,000 ton/yr cargo capacity, 40,000 m2 terminal, 336,000 ton/yr perishable capacity, 18,000 m2 perishable area, 15-25C/2-8C/-20C cold storage and live-animal storage.

confidence_rules.message: Temperature-sensitive/pharma cargo should not receive high confidence if airport cold-chain capability is unknown.

confidence_rules.required_airport_fields: perishable_handling; frozen_storage or temperature_controlled_storage when relevant
confidence_rules.message: Perishable cargo needs airport handling and storage capability matched to commodity and temperature.
Live animal cargo requires airport/handler animal handling capability and carrier acceptance.
Heavy/outsized cargo needs airport loading equipment, ULD/main-deck capability, and piece fit checks.
Valuable/vulnerable cargo needs secure storage or controlled handover; no VAL means block or reroute.
Dangerous goods cargo requires airport/handler DG acceptance and storage capability.
